ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "outdoor_temp" REAL /* Outdoor air drybulb temperature in Celsius */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Total transmitted solar radiation in Watts */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in Pa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_data" (
  "zone_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental data entry */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., Zone One) */,
  "mean_air_temp" REAL /* Mean air temperature of the zone in Celsius */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the zone */,
  "zone_area" REAL /* Total area of the zone in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environment_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surface_data" (
  "surface_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surface data entry */,
  "zone_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone data entry */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., WALL001, WIN001) */,
  "sunlit_fraction" REAL /* Fraction of the surface that is sunlit */,
  "incident_solar_radiation" REAL /* Incident solar radiation rate per area in W/m2 */,
  "surface_orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the surface (e.g., north, south) */,
  "surface_tilt" REAL /* Angle of the surface from the horizontal in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surface_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surface_data_zone_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_data_id") REFERENCES zone_data ("zone_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temperature_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for temperature data entry */,
  "surface_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the surface data entry */,
  "surface_location" TEXT /* Location of the surface (e.g., Inside Face, Outside Face) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the surface in Celsius */,
  "temperature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of temperature measurement (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_surface_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("surface_data_id") REFERENCES surface_data ("surface_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_radiation_data" (
  "radiation_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for solar radiation data entry */,
  "surface_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the surface data entry */,
  "surface_location" TEXT /* Location of the surface (e.g., Inside Face, Outside Face) */,
  "solar_radiation_rate" REAL /* Solar radiation rate received by the surface in W */,
  "radiation_unit" TEXT /* Unit of solar radiation measurement (e.g., W, W/m2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radiation_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_radiation_data_surface_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("surface_data_id") REFERENCES surface_data ("surface_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "building_size" REAL /* Total size of the building in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., engineering, architecture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumptions" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for energy consumption entry */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the consumption record */,
  "energy_used" REAL /* Amount of energy used in kWh */,
  "energy_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy measurement (e.g., kWh, MWh) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumptions_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report in text format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
